title: List of 10 stock ideas
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey everyone! I've gathered the list of top 10 ranked stocks from my [Cyclical Barbell](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/104089) strategy.

# Summary Analysis & Trade Signals

|Stock Name (Ticker)|Technical Summary|Fundamental Insight|Entry Signal (Buy/Support)|Exit Signal (Sell/Resistance)|
|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|
|**Shell (NYSE:SHEL)**|Bullish alignment; near 52-week highs. RSI neutral at 67.9.|Mega-cap stability; robust buyback program.|**$90.30** (20-day SMA)|**$94.66** (Current Resistance)|
|**Marathon (NYSE:MPC)**|Strong uptrend; trading well above 50/200-day averages.|High refining margins; strong cash flow.|**$234.45** (20-day SMA)|**$248.50** (Recent Peak)|
|**Valero (NYSE:VLO)**|Bullish; consolidating after recent price surge.|Market leader in refining efficiency.|**$237.15** (Support)|**$252.00** (Target)|
|**Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX)**|Healthy bullish trend; RSI at a neutral 54.1.|Diversified midstream and refining assets.|**$175.70** (20-day SMA)|**$185.00** (Resistance)|
|**Imperial Oil (NYSEAM:IMO)**|**Overbought** (RSI 73.1). Caution recommended for new entries.|Strong Canadian oil sands exposure.|**$125.48** (Pullback level)|**$132.00** (Take Profit)|
|**Woodside (NYSE:WDS)**|Bullish; reclaimed 50-day SMA ($20.56) recently.|Expanding LNG portfolio; high-yield potential.|**$23.25** (Support)|**$25.50** (Resistance)|
|**Plains All Amer. (NASDAQ:PAA)**|Stable uptrend; RSI 64.4 suggests room for growth.|Midstream volume growth; consistent payouts.|**$21.80** (Entry)|**$23.00** (Resistance)|
|**Archrock (NYSE:AROC)**|Mid-cap bullish trend; steady volume growth.|Beneficiary of increased natural gas production.|**$33.50** (50-day SMA)|**$36.50** (Target)|
|**HNI Corp (NYSE:HNI)**|**Bearish alignment; Oversold** (RSI 23.7).|Facing earnings headwinds and margin pressure.|**Wait for stabilization**|**$36.85** (20-day SMA)|
|**HF Sinclair (NYSE:DINO)**|Bullish momentum; tracking refining peer performance.|Strategic focus on renewable fuels.|**$58.50** (Support)|**$64.00** (Target)|

# Analysis & Insights

* **Sector Trend:** Most energy stocks (SHEL, MPC, VLO) are in a **Bullish Alignment**, meaning their current prices are above both short-term (50-day) and long-term (200-day) moving averages.
* **Caution Flags:** **Imperial Oil (IMO)** is currently flagged as **Overbought** with an RSI over 70, suggesting a potential short-term pullback. Conversely, **HNI Corp (HNI)** is **Oversold** (RSI below 30), indicating a possible relief rally but within a larger bearish trend.
* **Trade Logic:** For the "Hold" signals, the strategy is to wait for price retracements toward the 20-day SMA (listed in the Entry column) before adding to positions.

You can clone setting of my strategy and modify it as you want. Let me know if you get a better performance :)
